steps.title: Use the axis of symmetry
steps.content: The maximum height occurs at $t=3$, so the parabola's axis of symmetry is $t=3$.

steps.title: Reflect the launch time
steps.content: The object has height $7$ at $t=0$. The matching time with the same height is the same distance on the other side of $t=3$: $$3+(3-0)=6.$$ That matches choice B.
